name: SA Sample - Approval Recommender
brief: Sample: AI approval recommendations on Business Central workflow approval requests.
description: Subscribes to the standard BC Approval workflow event. When an Approval Request is created, a Smart Agent reads the source document and writes a recommendation — Approve, Reject, or Hold with a reason — to a related table surfaced on the Approval Entries page. Brings AI assistance to D365 BC's standard approval engine without replacing it.
